history.en: Developed in the 1970s by Linda S. Spurlin in Alaska to create a companion-sized version of the Alaskan Husky. Foundation stock included Siberian and Alaskan Huskies, with potential crosses of Schipperke and American Eskimo Dog to reduce size. Recognized by UKC but not currently AKC recognized.
history.zh: 20世纪70年代由琳达·S·斯普林在阿拉斯加培育，旨在创造伴侣犬大小的阿拉斯加哈士奇版本。基础犬群包括西伯利亚哈士奇和阿拉斯加哈士奇，可能通过雪纳瑞犬和美国爱斯基摩犬杂交以减小体型。获得联合犬业俱乐部（UKC）认可，但尚未被AKC承认。

overview.en: The Alaskan Klee Kai is a small to medium-sized, intelligent, and energetic breed developed in the 1970s as a companion-sized version of the Alaskan Husky. Known for their alert, curious, and playful nature, these dogs are loyal to their families but can be reserved with strangers. Their high intelligence and independent streak make them engaging yet challenging pets. They have a striking appearance with a mask-like face, erect ears, and a plush double coat. Bred for companionship, they thrive on human interaction and can be vocal, alerting owners to anything unusual. While not aggressive, they are natural watchdogs. Their energy levels are moderate to high, requiring both physical and mental stimulation. They are best suited for experienced owners who appreciate a spirited, mischievous, and devoted canine partner.
overview.zh: 阿拉斯加克利凯犬是一种中小型犬种，聪明、精力充沛，于20世纪70年代培育而成，是阿拉斯加哈士奇的伴侣型缩小版。它们以警觉、好奇和爱玩的天性著称，对家庭忠诚，但对陌生人可能有所保留。高智商和独立的性格使它们既迷人又具有挑战性。它们拥有醒目的外观，包括面具般的面部斑纹、竖立的耳朵和丰厚的双层被毛。作为伴侣犬，它们渴望与人互动，可能会吠叫以提醒主人注意异常情况。它们不具攻击性，但天生是优秀的看门犬。精力水平中等偏高，需要身体和心理的双重刺激。最适合有经验且欣赏活泼、调皮且忠诚伴侣的主人。

care.en: Daily care for an Alaskan Klee Kai includes thorough grooming due to their thick double coat. Brush at least two to three times a week, and daily during heavy shedding seasons in spring and fall. Bathing should be done only when necessary to preserve natural oils. Exercise is crucial: they need at least 45-60 minutes of activity daily, including walks, runs, or play sessions in a secure area. They are agile and enjoy interactive games like fetch or agility training. Regular veterinary check-ups are essential, including dental care, ear cleaning to prevent infections, and nail trimming every few weeks. Because they are prone to certain genetic conditions like patellar luxation and eye issues, routine health screenings are recommended. Always provide fresh water and a comfortable resting area. Their coat also provides insulation, so avoid overexposure to extreme heat.
care.zh: 阿拉斯加克利凯犬的日常护理需要彻底梳理其厚厚的双层被毛。每周至少刷毛两到三次，在春季和秋季的换毛高峰期应每天梳理。仅在必要时洗澡，以保护其天然油脂。运动至关重要：每天至少需要45到60分钟的活动，包括散步、跑步或在安全区域玩耍。它们敏捷好动，喜欢接球或敏捷训练等互动游戏。定期兽医检查必不可少，包括牙齿护理、清洁耳朵以防感染，以及每隔几周修剪指甲。由于它们易患髌骨脱位和眼部问题等遗传性疾病，建议进行常规健康筛查。始终提供新鲜饮水和舒适的休息区。它们的被毛具有隔热作用，因此要避免长时间暴露在极端高温下。

training.en: Training an Alaskan Klee Kai requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. This intelligent breed can be stubborn and independent, so harsh methods will backfire. Start socialization and basic obedience early, exposing them to various people, dogs, and environments to prevent shyness or reactivity. Use short, engaging sessions with rewards like treats, praise, or toys. They excel at learning tricks and problem-solving activities, which also provide mental stimulation. Crate training is recommended for safety and housebreaking. Because they have a strong prey drive, recall training in a secure, fenced area is essential. Avoid repetitive drills; instead, mix up commands to keep their interest. They respond well to clicker training and games that challenge their minds. A well-trained Klee Kai becomes a delightful, well-mannered companion.
training.zh: 训练阿拉斯加克利凯犬需要耐心、一致性和正向强化。这个聪明的犬种可能固执且独立，因此严厉的方法会适得其反。尽早开始社会化训练和基础服从训练，让它们接触不同的人、狗和环境，以防害羞或反应过度。使用简短有趣的训练课程，配合零食、表扬或玩具作为奖励。它们擅长学习技巧和解决问题类活动，这也能提供精神刺激。建议进行笼内训练，以确保安全和帮助室内排便。由于它们有强烈的捕猎本能，在安全围栏区域进行召回训练至关重要。避免重复练习，而要混合不同的指令以保持其兴趣。响片训练和挑战思维的游戏效果很好。训练有素的克利凯犬会成为令人愉快的、有礼貌的伴侣。

diet.en: Feed your Alaskan Klee Kai a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. As a small to medium breed, they typically do well on premium dry kibble formulated for active dogs. Portion control is important to prevent obesity, as they can be food-motivated. Divide daily food into two meals to maintain stable energy and digestion. Include lean protein sources, healthy fats, and complex carbohydrates. Some owners choose raw or home-cooked diets under veterinary guidance. Always ensure fresh water is available. Avoid overfeeding treats, and opt for healthy options like small pieces of carrot or apple. Be aware of potential food allergies or sensitivities; monitor for signs of digestive upset. Consult your vet for specific recommendations, especially if your dog has health issues like pancreatitis or joint concerns.
diet.zh: 为您的阿拉斯加克利凯犬提供适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。作为中小型犬种，它们通常适合食用专为活跃犬配制的高品质干粮。控制食量很重要，以防肥胖，因为它们可能对食物很执着。将每日食物分成两餐，以维持稳定的能量和消化。饮食中应包含瘦蛋白、健康脂肪和复合碳水化合物。一些主人会在兽医指导下选择生食或自制饮食。始终确保有新鲜饮用水。避免过量喂食零食，选择胡萝卜或苹果小块等健康选项。注意潜在的食物过敏或不耐受；观察消化不良的迹象。如有健康问题（如胰腺炎或关节问题），请咨询兽医获取具体建议。

livingTips.en: The Alaskan Klee Kai can adapt to apartment living if provided with sufficient daily exercise, but they do best in homes with a securely fenced yard where they can run and explore. They are escape artists, so fences should be high and secure. This breed is generally good with older, respectful children, but may be too reserved or nippy with very young kids if not properly socialized. They can coexist with other dogs and cats if raised together, but their prey drive may cause issues with small pets like rodents or birds. They are sensitive to extreme heat and cold, so provide climate-controlled comfort. They are vocal and may bark at noises, making them good watchdogs but potentially challenging for close neighbors. Early socialization helps reduce excessive barking. They thrive on companionship and should not be left alone for long periods, as separation anxiety can develop. A confident, experienced owner is ideal.
livingTips.zh: 阿拉斯加克利凯犬如果能获得足够的日常运动，可以适应公寓生活，但它们更适合有安全围栏院子的家庭，以便奔跑和探索。它们是逃跑专家，因此围栏应高而牢固。该犬种通常与年长、有礼貌的孩子相处良好，但如果没有适当的社会化训练，可能对非常年幼的孩子过于拘谨或出现轻咬行为。如果从小一起养，它们可以与其他狗和猫共存，但其捕猎本能可能会对啮齿类或鸟类等小宠物造成问题。它们对极端高温和寒冷敏感，因此需提供温度适宜的环境。它们爱叫，会对声音吠叫，是优秀的看门犬，但对邻居可能造成困扰。早期社会化有助于减少过度吠叫。它们渴望陪伴，不应长时间独处，否则可能产生分离焦虑。自信且有经验的主人最为理想。
